description: Create a comprehensive GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on pushes to specific branches and tags, on pull requests, manually, and on a daily schedule. The workflow has multiple jobs with dependencies: core, tests, extras, and conda. The core and tests jobs use a reusable workflow with tox, while extras also uses tox but with different settings. The conda job runs on ubuntu-latest, sets up miniconda, installs ablog, and runs tests with pytest and make.
